name: Quick & Easy Apple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the apples and apple cider in a 1 1/2-quart microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cover tightly with plastic wrap.
3. Microwave on High for 15 minutes.
4. Carefully remove the plastic wrap and stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Return to microwave and cook, uncovered, for another 10 minutes, stirring every 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Transfer the mixture to a blender or food processor and process until smooth.
7. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
